points_en: In the early years after independence, 'development' was widely understood as becoming more modern and industrialized.
There was a consensus that government must play a key role in planning and eradicating poverty.
Development involved adopting capitalism, liberalism, and rationality.
points_hi: आजादी के बाद विकास का अर्थ आधुनिक और औद्योगिक बनना था।
सरकार की भूमिका महत्वपूर्ण मानी गई।
पूंजीवाद और उदारवाद अपनाना शामिल था।
